test case id: tc-updatetrip-001 title: update trip data with valid data module: trip data update source pages: 4 preconditions: a trip exists. test data: - city: los angeles - country: usa - begindate: 2023-10-05 - enddate: 2023-10-11 - author: john doe test steps: 1. user navigates to the trip data update page. 2. user selects the trip. 3. user enters valid updated trip details. 4. user clicks on the "update trip" button. 5. main component updates the trip data. 6. main component saves the updated trip data to the trips database. expected result: user receives a success message indicating the trip data was updated successfully.

test case id: tc-trip-001 title: create a new trip with valid data module: trip creation source pages: 1, 4 preconditions: a user is logged in. test data: - city: new york - country: usa - begindate: 2023-10-01 - enddate: 2023-10-07 - author: john doe test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user navigates to the trip creation page. 3. user enters valid trip details. 4. user clicks on the "create trip" button. 5. main component creates the trip. 6. main component associates the trip with a plan. 7. main component saves the trip data to the trips database. expected result: user receives a success message indicating the trip was created successfully.

test case id: tc-changeuserprofile-001 title: change user profile with valid data module: user profile management source pages: 5 preconditions: a user is logged in. test data: - username: john_doe_new - password: newsecurepassword - name: john doe new - email: johndoenew@example.com test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user navigates to the user profile management page. 3. user enters valid new profile data. 4. user clicks on the "save changes" button. 5. main component retrieves the new data. 6. main component verifies the data. 7. main component updates the user data in the users database. 8. main component returns a success message. expected result: user receives a success message indicating the profile was updated successfully.
